critical_issue.fix: Replace the above with: ```typescript import { getSql } from "./connection" ```

task.objective: Migrate lib/db-users.ts to lib/db/users.ts, removing duplicate getSql()

step.details:
Add these type exports: ```typescript export interface DashboardUser { id: number email: string role: "admin" | "viewer" invited_by: number | null default_org_id: number | null created_at: string updated_at: string }
export interface Invite { id: number email: string role: "admin" | "viewer" invited_by: number organization_id: number | null used: boolean created_at: string } ```

Add these exports: ```typescript // User operations export { getUserByEmail, getAllUsers, createUser, updateUserRole, deleteUser, getInviteByEmail, getAllInvites, createInvite, markInviteAsUsedById, markInviteAsUsed, deleteInvite, checkUserAccess, isAdmin, } from "./users"
// Types - add to existing type exports export type { DashboardUser, Invite, } from "./types" ```

consumers.consumer: Change: `import type { DashboardUser, Invite } from "@/lib/db-users"` To: `import type { DashboardUser, Invite } from "@/lib/db"`
Change: `import { getUserByEmail } from "@/lib/db-users"` To: `import { getUserByEmail } from "@/lib/db"` Note: May already import from @/lib/db, consolidate imports

Change: `import { isAdmin, getAllInvites, createInvite, deleteInvite, getUserByEmail, createUser } from "@/lib/db-users"` To: `import { isAdmin, getAllInvites, createInvite, deleteInvite, getUserByEmail, createUser } from "@/lib/db"` Note: May already import from @/lib/db-orgs, consolidate both into single @/lib/db import
Change: `import type { DashboardUser } from "@/lib/db-users"` To: `import type { DashboardUser } from "@/lib/db"`

Change: `import { isAdmin, getAllUsers, updateUserRole, deleteUser, getUserByEmail } from "@/lib/db-users"` To: `import { isAdmin, getAllUsers, updateUserRole, deleteUser, getUserByEmail } from "@/lib/db"`
Change: `import { checkUserAccess } from "@/lib/db-users"` To: `import { checkUserAccess } from "@/lib/db"`

constraints.constraint: No functional changes - pure structural refactoring
Build must pass before deleting original file

task.success_criteria: - lib/db/users.ts created using getSql from connection.ts (NOT local definition) - Types added to lib/db/types.ts - All exports added to lib/db/index.ts - All 6 consumer imports updated - lib/db-users.ts deleted - Build passes - No duplicate getSql() exists in codebase

mandatory_final_step.description: Update the feature's status.md file with execution results.
mandatory_final_step.action:
After completing all steps, UPDATE the file: docs/prompts/remaining-db-refactoring/status.md
with: - Date: Get from system (date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Prompt: phases/03_migrate_users.xml - Phase: 03 - Migrate Users (Critical Fix) - Status: completed | partial | blocked - Summary of what was done - CONFIRM: Duplicate getSql() removed - Any issues encountered - Next: phases/04_cleanup_verification.xml

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(remaining-db-refactoring): phase-03 - Migrate lib/db-users.ts and fix duplicate getSql()
mandatory_commit_step.action: 1. Stage: git add lib/db/ app/ components/ docs/prompts/remaining-db-refactoring/ 2. Commit with format above
